title: The znibis
description: This mod adds a creature that lurks in your world...
body:
This mod basically adds me. Or does it? The mod adds a creature called znibsss that lurks in your world. When will it show up? How strong is it? Is it friendly? Nobody knows...

 

This mod IS INCOMPLETE!! I have many more features to add later on. Like really.



For now, this mod just add znibsss and a gun that is dropped from znibsss. Check changelogs to see what has been added in the newest version since I won't change the description unless I add a lot of content in one update.



This mod is supposed to be in between of a joke mod and a serious mod. If znibsss doesn't spawn in within the third and the tenth day then it is a bug.

Also for some reasons one of the craft doesn't show up in JEI so to craft the gun core which is either used to repare or duplicate guns, you just place your gun in a smithing table next to a netherite ingot and you'll get one gun core. To repare the Broken Gun Core, just place it next to a netherite ingot in a smithing table and you'll get one Gun Core.

My discord server: https://discord.gg/prQDTTMuxe

Curseforge page of the mod: https://curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-znibis

If you use this mod in your modpack or video just credit me :)
